name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: Dallas, GA's TitleMax Title Pawns at 1261 Merchants Dr offers quick title loans and pawns, Mon-Sat.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Pawns in Dallas, GA is located at 1261 Merchants Dr Suite 100, a standalone storefront convenient for residents of Dallas seeking quick financial solutions. This Dallas location operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 4 PM, and closes on Sundays.

At this Dallas location, you can obtain title loans using your vehicle as collateral or pawn items for immediate cash. The store also buys gold and jewelry. Contact the Dallas store directly at +1 678-564-1696 for details on loan amounts, interest rates, and pawn values.

For Dallas residents needing urgent cash, bring your vehicle title and photo ID to qualify for a title loan, or bring items you'd like to pawn. This TitleMax location serves the Dallas community with flexible lending options.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee — this is a collateral-based lending product, not a subscription service.

pros: Founded in 1998 with 27+ years of title lending experience and 900+ physical store locations across 14 states
Funds disbursed in as little as 30 minutes — genuine same-day cash at most locations
No credit score required — approval based on vehicle value, not credit history
No bank account required — accessible to unbanked and underbanked borrowers
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle throughout the entire loan term
Mobile app (iOS and Android) plus online portal at account.titlemax.com for self-service account management
No prepayment penalty — paying off the loan early does not trigger additional fees
cons: Interest rates reportedly 100%–300%+ APR depending on state — among the highest costs in consumer lending
2023 CFPB enforcement action resulted in a $10 million penalty for violating the Military Lending Act and selling worthless insurance on approximately 15,000 loans
Not BBB accredited; significant complaint volume on BBB and ComplaintsBoard regarding undisclosed fees and aggressive refinancing practices
Available in only 14 states — the majority of U.S. consumers cannot access TitleMax at all
State loan caps severely limit loan size in some markets (e.g., $3,250 max in Mississippi, $6,500 in Tennessee)
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit history who need same-day cash and have exhausted lower-cost options
Unbanked consumers who cannot meet the account requirements of online personal lenders
Borrowers in acute financial emergencies who own their car or motorcycle outright or have significant equity in it
Consumers physically located near one of TitleMax's 900+ stores in its 14 operating states
diagnosis: TitleMax is a genuine option of last resort for vehicle-owning consumers with poor or no credit who need fast cash and cannot qualify elsewhere — the no-credit-check approval, 30-minute turnaround, and massive store network are real advantages in that narrow situation. However, triple-digit APRs and a documented federal enforcement action for harming military families and deceiving borrowers make this a high-risk lender that should only be considered when lower-cost alternatives such as credit union PALs, CDFI loans, or personal loans under 36% APR are definitively unavailable.
services: Personal installment loans (select states: AZ, DE, KS, MS, MO, NV, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Same-day cash disbursement in as little as 30 minutes
In-store vehicle appraisal for loan qualification
Mobile app for iOS and Android (balance, payments, payment history, store locator)
Multi-state in-person store network (900+ locations across 14 states)
meta_description: Dallas, GA - TitleMax Title Pawns at 1261 Merchants Dr. Quick title loans & pawn services.
